questions.question: Restaurant mein sabse pehla goal kya hota hai?

options.A: Customer ko khush karna

questions.explanation: Customer satisfaction sabse important hai, kyunki khush customer dobara aata hai aur doosron ko bhi batata hai.

questions.question: F&B service mein 'F&B' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Food and Beverages

questions.explanation: F&B ka matlab Food and Beverages hota hai, jo restaurant mein serve kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Fine dining restaurant mein kis type ki service expect ki jaati hai?

options.A: Formal aur attentive service

questions.explanation: Fine dining mein detailed, formal aur attentive service di jaati hai, jahan har cheez ka khayal rakha jaata hai.

questions.question: Casual dining restaurant mein service ka style kaisa hota hai?

options.A: Relaxed aur friendly

questions.explanation: Casual dining mein atmosphere relaxed hota hai aur service friendly hoti hai, lekin professional bhi.

questions.question: Buffet service mein waiter ka role kya hota hai?

options.A: Guests ko buffet line guide karna aur plates dena

questions.explanation: Buffet mein waiter guests ko navigate karne, plates provide karne aur empty plates clear karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Room service mein waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Order timely deliver karna aur table set karna

questions.explanation: Room service mein order ko promptly deliver karna aur guest ki marzi se table set karna important hai.

questions.question: Aapko ek table assign kiya gaya hai. Sabse pehle aap kya karenge?

options.A: Table ko check karna ki woh saaf aur ready hai

questions.explanation: Table assign hone par sabse pehle table ki cleanliness aur setup check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'mise en place' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Service ke liye sab kuch ready rakhna

questions.explanation: Mise en place ka matlab hai 'everything in its place', yani service se pehle sabhi utensils, cutlery, condiments, etc. ready rakhna.

questions.question: Waiter ki uniform kaisi honi chahiye?

options.A: Saaf, neat aur professional

questions.explanation: Uniform hamesha saaf, neat, aur professional honi chahiye jo restaurant ki image maintain kare.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'service charge' kya hota hai?

options.A: Service ke liye liya jaane wala extra charge

questions.explanation: Service charge ek additional amount hota hai jo service ke liye bill mein add kiya jaata hai, ye tip se alag hota hai.

questions.question: Aap kisi table ke paas jaate hain aur guests khana kha rahe hain. Aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Thoda intezaar karna jab tak woh finish na kar lein
options.D: Table saaf karna shuru kar dena

questions.explanation: Jab guests kha rahe hon, toh unhe disturb nahi karna chahiye. Unke khaane ke baad hi unse interact karna chahiye.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'cover' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek guest ke liye table setting

questions.explanation: Ek 'cover' ka matlab ek guest ke liye poori table setting (cutlery, glassware, napkin) se hota hai.

questions.question: Aaj kal ke restaurants mein 'sustainability' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Environment ko protect karna aur resources save karna

questions.explanation: Sustainability mein waste kam karna, local sourcing aur energy efficiency jaise practices shamil hain jo environment ke liye behtar hain.

questions.question: Agar koi guest restaurant ke ambience (atmosphere) ke baare mein complain kare toh aap kya karenge?

options.A: Unki baat sunenge, sorry bolenge aur manager ko inform karenge

questions.explanation: Guest ki complain ko seriously lena, unhe sunna aur manager tak pahunchana ek professional approach hai.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'upselling' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Guest ko zyada expensive item suggest karna
options.D: Guest ko table change karne bolna

questions.explanation: Upselling mein waiter guest ko unke order se thoda zyada expensive ya premium option suggest karta hai, jaise better wine ya special dish.

questions.question: Cross-contamination kya hota hai?

options.A: Jab bacteria ek food item se doosre mein transfer ho jaye
options.B: Jab ek waiter do tables ko serve kare

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination tab hota hai jab harmful bacteria ek food se dusre mein failte hain, jaise raw meat se cooked food mein.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'turnover' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek table ko kitni baar use kiya ja sakta hai ek din mein

questions.explanation: Table turnover refers to the number of times a table is occupied by different customers during a specific period, usually a meal service.

questions.question: Customer service mein sabse important cheez kya hai?

options.A: Guest ko special feel karwana

questions.explanation: Guest ko valuable aur special feel karwana achhi customer service ka core hai.

questions.question: Jab aap kisi guest se baat kar rahe hon, toh aapko unki taraf dekhna chahiye ya nahi?

options.A: Haan, hamesha eye contact banana chahiye
options.C: Sirf tab jab woh kuch maangein
options.D: Sirf jab aap order le rahe hon

questions.explanation: Eye contact banane se guest ko lagta hai ki aap unhe importance de rahe hain aur unki baat sun rahe hain.

questions.question: Agar koi guest naraaz hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Shanti se unki baat sunni chahiye aur solution dhundhna chahiye
options.D: Seedha manager ko bula lena chahiye bina baat sune

questions.explanation: Naraaz guest ko shanti se sunna aur samjhana pehla kadam hai. Bahas karna ya ignore karna situation ko bigaad sakta hai.

questions.question: Waiter ko kaise khade hona chahiye jab woh table ke paas ho?

options.A: Straight, confident pose mein, thoda jhuk kar agar zaruri ho
options.D: Ek pair table par rakh kar

questions.explanation: Professional pose mein khade hona chahiye, jo attentive aur ready lage. Zyada casual nahi hona chahiye.

questions.question: Kisi guest ko 'Sir' ya 'Ma'am' kehna kaisa hai?

options.A: Professional aur respectful tareeka
options.C: Aamtaur par nahi use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: 'Sir' aur 'Ma'am' ka upyog guest ke prati respect dikhata hai, khaas kar jab aap unka naam nahi jaante.

questions.question: Agar koi guest aapko naam se bulata hai, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Reply karna aur unki taraf dekhna
options.C: Unhe naam se nahi bulana chahiye kehna
options.D: Unhone naam galat liya hai kehna

questions.explanation: Jab guest aapko naam se bulayein, toh response dena aur unki taraf dekhna achhi service hai.

questions.question: Restaurant mein silence ka kya role hai?

options.A: Guest ko disturb na karna aur unke conversation ko respect dena
options.C: Staff ko baat nahi karne dena

questions.explanation: Waiter ko guests ke beech mein unnecessarily nahi bolna chahiye, unke private moments ko respect karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar koi guest table change karna chahe toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unki request ko sunna aur agar possible ho toh help karna
options.C: Manager ko kehna ki woh sambhalein

questions.explanation: Guest ki request ko sunna aur agar feasible ho toh unhe dusri table provide karna achhi service hai.

questions.question: Waiter ka attitude kaisa hona chahiye?

options.A: Positive, helpful aur professional

questions.explanation: Ek positive aur helpful attitude guest ko comfortable feel karata hai aur service ko behtar banata hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest kisi dish ke baare mein sawaal puche jo aapko nahi pata, toh aap kya karenge?

options.A: Sachchai se batana ki aapko nahi pata aur chef ya senior se pooch kar aana
options.D: Guest ko kehna ki woh khud dekh lein

questions.explanation: Jhoot bolne ya guess karne se behtar hai ki sachchai se bata dein ki aapko nahi pata aur sahi information lekar aayein.

questions.question: Table ko 'clearing' karte waqt kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Guest ko disturb na karein aur sirf empty plates uthayein
options.B: Guest ke saamne hi plate saaf karein
options.C: Sab kuch ek saath utha lein
options.D: Guest ko bole ki woh plates side mein kar de

questions.explanation: Clearing karte waqt guests ke khane mein disturb na ho aur sirf khaali bartan hi uthayein jo unke liye ab use mein nahi hain.

questions.question: Guest ko 'thank you' kehna kahan important hai?

options.A: Jab woh ja rahe hon, aur jab bill pay kar rahe hon
options.B: Sirf jab woh bill pay karein
options.C: Sirf jab woh restaurant mein enter karein

questions.explanation: 'Thank you' kehna ek gesture hai jo guest ko appreciate karta hai aur unhe achha experience deta hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest aapko compliment de, toh aapko kya kehna chahiye?

options.A: 'Thank you' kehna aur smile karna

questions.explanation: Compliment receive karne par 'Thank you' kehna polite aur professional hai.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'ambience' mein kya kya shamil hota hai?

options.A: Lighting, music, decor, aur overall feel

questions.explanation: Ambience mein restaurant ka mahol, jaise lighting, music, sajawat, aur guest ko feel hone wali cheezein shamil hain.

questions.question: Agar koi guest kisi dish ko 'too spicy' kahe, toh aap kya suggest kar sakte hain?

options.A: Dahi, milk, ya kuch meetha suggest karna
options.C: Guest ko kehna ki woh control karein
options.D: Dish wapas le lena bina kuch kiye

questions.explanation: Spicy khane ke baad dahi, doodh ya kuch meetha khane se spice kam hota hai. Ye ek practical suggestion hai.

questions.question: Teamwork ka restaurant service mein kya importance hai?

options.A: Sab log milkar kaam karein toh service smooth hoti hai
options.C: Waiter ko akele kaam karna chahiye
options.D: Teamwork se time waste hota hai

questions.explanation: Achha teamwork restaurant ki efficiency aur guest experience ko improve karta hai, kyunki sab ek dusre ki help karte hain.

questions.question: Agar aapki shift khatam ho gayi hai aur aap ja rahe hain, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Apna section saaf karke aur agli shift wale ko update dekar jana
options.C: Apne dosto ke saath time pass karna
options.D: Guest se bina mile chale jana

questions.explanation: Shift khatam hone par apna kaam properly handover karna aur agli shift wale ko table status batana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Menu mein 'Appetizers' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Khane se pehle khane wale chote items

questions.explanation: Appetizers, ya starters, khane ki shuruaat mein serve kiye jaane wale chote pakwaan hote hain.

questions.question: Menu mein 'Main Course' kya hota hai?

options.A: Khane ka sabse bada aur important dish

questions.explanation: Main course khane ka central dish hota hai, jo aksar meat, fish, ya substantial vegetarian option hota hai.

questions.question: Menu mein 'Dessert' kab serve kiya jata hai?

options.A: Main course ke baad

questions.explanation: Desserts, jo meethe hote hain, woh main course khatam hone ke baad serve kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar koi guest vegetarian hai, toh aapko menu mein kya dekhna chahiye?

options.A: Vegetarian options, jaise paneer, vegetables, dal

questions.explanation: Vegetarian guests ke liye alag se vegetarian options dekhna aur suggest karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Menu mein 'A la carte' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Har dish ko alag se order karna aur uski alag price dena
options.B: Set meal jisme sab kuch included ho

questions.explanation: A la carte mein guests menu se apni pasand ki dishes alag-alag choose karte hain aur har dish ki price alag hoti hai.

questions.question: Menu mein 'Table d'hôte' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek fixed price wala set menu jisme pehle se tay dishes hot hain

questions.explanation: Table d'hôte ek set menu hota hai jisme kuch dishes ka combination ek fixed price par offer kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Kisi dish ke ingredients ke baare mein poochne par waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Menu se padh kar batana ya chef se confirm karna
options.C: Kehna ki woh allergic hai toh na khaye

questions.explanation: Guest ko dish ke ingredients ke baare mein sahi jaankari dena important hai, khaas kar agar unhe koi allergy ho.

questions.question: Agar koi guest 'Chef's Special' ke baare mein puche toh aap kya karenge?

options.A: Chef's Special dish ke baare mein detail mein batana
options.B: Kehna ki yeh roz badalta hai
options.D: Guest ko dusra dish suggest karna

questions.explanation: Chef's Special ek unique dish hoti hai, uske baare mein guests ko batana unhe try karne ke liye encourage karta hai.

questions.question: Order lete waqt aapko kya note karna chahiye?

options.A: Guest ka order, koi special request, aur table number

questions.explanation: Order lete waqt saari details, jaise food, drinks, quantity, special instructions, aur table number likhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest 'mildly spiced' khana maange, toh aap kya suggest karenge?

options.A: Aisi dishes jinmein kam masale use hue hon

questions.explanation: Mildly spiced ka matlab hai kam masaledar. Waiter ko aise options batane chahiye jo kam spicy hon.

questions.question: Agar koi guest kisi dish ko 'gluten-free' maange, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Menu mein gluten-free options check karna ya chef se confirm karna
options.B: Seedha kehna ki sab gluten-free hai

questions.explanation: Gluten allergy serious ho sakti hai. Waiter ko gluten-free options ki sahi jaankari deni chahiye aur chef se confirm karna chahiye.

questions.question: Menu mein 'Side Dishes' kya hote hain?

options.A: Main course ke saath serve hone wale chote items jaise fries, salad
options.B: Main course ke baad aane wale

questions.explanation: Side dishes woh items hain jo main course ke saath serve kiye jaate hain taaki meal poora lage.

questions.question: Agar koi guest kisi dish mein 'no onion' ya 'no garlic' kahe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.A: Chef se confirm karna ki kya dish onion/garlic ke bina ban sakti hai
options.B: Kehna ki yeh possible nahi hai
options.C: Guest ko dusri dish suggest karna bina confirm kiye
options.D: Guest ko kehna ki woh khud onion nikal de

questions.explanation: Special dietary requests ko seriously lena aur chef se confirm karna zaroori hai taaki guest ko safe aur sahi khana mile.

questions.question: Menu mein 'Seasonal Specials' kya hote hain?

options.A: Jo dishes season ke hisaab se available ingredients se banti hain

questions.explanation: Seasonal specials mein woh dishes aati hain jo uss specific season mein milne wale taaza ingredients ka use karke banayi jaati hain.

questions.question: Order confirm karte waqt aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Guest ko order repeat karke sunana
options.C: Order ko likh kar rakhna aur guest ko dikhana
options.D: Order jaldi se kitchen mein dena

questions.explanation: Order repeat karne se mistakes avoid hoti hain aur guest ko yakin hota hai ki unka order sahi liya gaya hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest 'fusion cuisine' ke baare mein puche, toh aap kya samjhayenge?

options.A: Jab do ya zyada cuisines ko mix karke naye dishes banayein

questions.explanation: Fusion cuisine mein alag-alag culinary traditions ke elements ko combine karke innovative dishes taiyar ki jaati hain.

questions.question: Menu knowledge ka waiter ke liye sabse bada fayda kya hai?

options.A: Guest ke sawaalon ka sahi jawab de sakta hai aur achhi recommendation de sakta hai
options.C: Guest ko confuse kar sakta hai
options.D: Kitchen staff se lad sakta hai

questions.explanation: Achha menu knowledge waiter ko confident banata hai aur guest ko unki pasand ke anusar sahi dish choose karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Table setting mein 'dinner plate' kahan rakhi jaati hai?

options.A: Center mein, guest ke saamne

questions.explanation: Dinner plate hamesha table ke center mein, guest ke saamne rakhi jaati hai.

questions.question: Cutlery (fork, knife, spoon) ko kaise arrange karte hain?

options.A: Bahari utensils pehle use hote hain, phir andar wale
options.C: Guest ke hisaab se nahi rakhte

questions.explanation: Cutlery ko order of use ke hisaab se arrange karte hain; jo bahar hote hain woh pehle use hote hain.

questions.question: Knife ko table setting mein kahan rakha jata hai?

options.A: Plate ke right side mein, blade andar ki taraf

questions.explanation: Knife ko plate ke right side mein rakhte hain, iska blade plate ki taraf hota hai.

questions.question: Fork ko table setting mein kahan rakha jata hai?

options.A: Plate ke left side mein, tines upar ki taraf

questions.explanation: Fork ko plate ke left side mein rakhte hain, iske tines (dante) upar ki taraf hote hain.

questions.question: Soup spoon ko kahan rakhte hain?

options.A: Knife ke right side mein, bowl upar ki taraf

questions.explanation: Soup spoon ko sabse bahar right side mein rakha jaata hai, iska bowl upar ki taraf hota hai.

questions.question: Dessert spoon aur fork ko kahan rakhte hain?

options.A: Plate ke upar horizontal position mein

questions.explanation: Dessert spoon aur fork ko plate ke upar rakhte hain, spoon handle right ki taraf aur fork handle left ki taraf.

questions.question: Water glass ko table setting mein kahan rakhte hain?

options.A: Knife ke upar, right side mein

questions.explanation: Water glass ko sabse pehle knife ke upar, right side mein rakha jaata hai.

questions.question: Bread plate aur butter knife ko kahan rakhte hain?

options.A: Left side mein, forks ke upar

questions.explanation: Bread plate ko left side mein, forks ke upar rakha jaata hai, aur butter knife uske upar horizontal.

questions.question: Napkin ko table setting mein kaise rakhte hain?

options.A: Plate ke upar ya left side mein
options.D: Sirf guest ke hath mein dena

questions.explanation: Napkin ko ya toh plate ke upar rakha jaata hai ya left side mein forks ke paas.

questions.question: Agar koi guest aata hai aur table setting nahi hai, toh waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Jaldi se table setting karni chahiye
options.C: Dusre table se saaman utha lena

questions.explanation: Guest ke aate hi table setting poori karna waiter ki zimmedari hai.

questions.question: 'Crumb the table' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Table se roti ke tukde (crumbs) saaf karna

questions.explanation: Crumb the table matlab guests ke khaane ke baad table par gire hue roti ya bread ke chote tukdon ko saaf karna.

questions.question: Service mein 'serving spoon' ka use kab hota hai?

options.A: Jab guests khud serve ho rahe hon (buffet) ya jab dish share ho rahi ho
options.B: Sirf drinks serve karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Serving spoons guests ko food serve karne mein help karte hain, khaas kar buffet ya family style service mein.

questions.question: Agar koi dish guest ke liye bahut garam hai, toh waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Guest ko warn karna ki dish garam hai aur thanda hone ka time dena
options.B: Seedha guest ke saamne rakh dena
options.C: Dish ko table par phenk dena
options.D: Guest ko kehna ki woh jaldi khaye

questions.explanation: Garam dishes serve karte waqt guest ko alert karna zaroori hai taaki koi accident na ho.

questions.question: Side dish serve karne ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.A: Main course ke saath ya thoda pehle

questions.explanation: Side dishes ko main course ke saath ya uske turant pehle serve karna chahiye taaki dono ek saath enjoy kiye ja sakein.

questions.question: Agar koi guest ka plate khali ho jaye, toh waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Turant plate ko clear karna
options.B: Guest ke jaane ka intezaar karna
options.D: Guest se puchna ki plate utha le

questions.explanation: Khali plates ko turant clear karne se table neat rehti hai aur guests ko space milti hai.

questions.question: Service mein 'underliner' ka kya use hai?

options.A: Plate ke neeche rakhi jaane wali cheez jo plate ko table se chipakne se rokati hai

questions.explanation: Underliner ek circular piece of cloth ya paper hota hai jo garam dishes ko table par rakhte waqt use hota hai taaki table damage na ho.

questions.question: Table setting mein 'wine glass' kahan rakhte hain?

options.A: Water glass ke right side mein ya thoda upar

questions.explanation: Wine glass ko usually water glass ke right side mein ya uske thoda upar rakha jaata hai, jo uski type par depend karta hai.

questions.question: Restaurant mein sabse common non-alcoholic drink kaun si hai?

options.A: Paani

questions.explanation: Paani sabse fundamental aur common non-alcoholic drink hai jo har guest expect karta hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest 'still water' maange, toh aap kya denge?

options.A: Normal mineral water (jis mein gas na ho)

questions.explanation: Still water matlab bina gas wala paani, jo normal mineral water hota hai.

questions.question: 'Sparkling water' mein kya hota hai?

options.A: Carbon dioxide gas (bubbles)

questions.explanation: Sparkling water mein carbonation hoti hai, yaani usmein gas ke bubbles hote hain.

questions.question: Tea banate waqt, 'steeping time' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Chai patti ko garam paani mein kitni der tak rakhna hai

questions.explanation: Steeping time woh samay hai jab chai patti garam paani mein dip rehti hai taaki uska flavour nikal aaye.

questions.question: Coffee mein 'espresso' kya hota hai?

options.A: Strong coffee jo high pressure se banayi jati hai

questions.explanation: Espresso ek concentrated coffee shot hai jo garam paani ko ground coffee beans se high pressure mein guzar kar banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest 'red wine' order kare, toh waiter ko kya pata hona chahiye?

options.A: Red wine ke types (Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon) aur unke food pairings
options.B: Sirf white wine ke baare mein

questions.explanation: Red wine ke types aur kaun si dish ke saath konsi wine achhi lagegi, yeh jaanna waiter ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Wine serve karte waqt, bottle ko kaise present karna chahiye?

options.A: Label guest ki taraf karke

questions.explanation: Wine bottle ko guest ke saamne label dikhate hue present karna chahiye taaki woh brand aur vintage check kar sakein.

questions.question: Beer serve karte waqt, glass mein kitni foam (head) honi chahiye?

options.A: Thodi si foam (about 1 inch)
options.D: Foam ke andar glass dikhna chahiye

questions.explanation: Beer mein thodi si foam (head) uske aroma aur taste ko enhance karti hai. Zyada ya kam foam achha nahi mana jaata.

questions.question: 'Cocktail' kya hota hai?

options.A: Alcoholic drink jo do ya zyada ingredients mix karke banta hai

questions.explanation: Cocktail ek alcoholic beverage hai jo spirits, liqueurs, mixers aur garnishes ko mix karke banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest 'mocktail' order kare, toh aap kya denge?

options.A: Non-alcoholic mixed drink

questions.explanation: Mocktail ek non-alcoholic version hota hai cocktail ka, jismein alcohol nahi hoti.

questions.question: Basic bar tools mein kya kya aata hai?

options.A: Shaker, strainer, jigger, bar spoon

questions.explanation: Shaker, strainer, jigger, bar spoon jaise tools cocktails banane ke liye zaruri hote hain.

questions.question: Agar koi guest ka birthday hai aur woh cake maange, toh waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Restaurant ke cake options suggest karna ya manager ko inform karna
options.C: Guest ko bahar se cake lane bolna

questions.explanation: Guest ki special occasions ko celebrate karne mein help karna achhi service ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Service mein 'garnish' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Drink ya dish ko attractive banana aur flavour enhance karna

questions.explanation: Garnish jaise lemon slice, cherry, ya mint leaf drink ko aesthetically pleasing banata hai aur kabhi kabhi taste bhi add karta hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest kehta hai ki coffee bahut 'bitter' hai, toh aap kya kar sakte hain?

options.A: Thoda sugar ya milk suggest karna
options.C: Guest ko kehna ki woh bitter hi hoti hai

questions.explanation: Bitter taste ko balance karne ke liye sugar ya milk add karna ek common solution hai.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'digestif' kya hota hai?

options.A: Meal ke baad peene wala drink jo digestion mein help kare (jaise brandy, liqueur)

questions.explanation: Digestif ek alcoholic beverage hai jo digestion ko promote karne ke liye meal ke baad liya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest 'hot chocolate' order kare, toh aapko kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Ki woh garam ho aur usmein marshmallows ya cream ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Hot chocolate ek garam drink hai jo chocolate se banti hai, aur aksar marshmallows ya cream ke saath serve hoti hai.

questions.question: Bar mein 'neat' drink ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Spirit ko bina kisi mixer ya ice ke serve karna
options.B: Spirit ko ice ke saath serve karna
options.C: Spirit ko pani ke saath serve karna
options.D: Spirit ko soda ke saath serve karna

questions.explanation: 'Neat' matlab spirit ko uski original form mein, bina ice ya mixer ke serve karna.

questions.question: Food safety mein sabse important kya hai?

options.A: Khane ko contamination se bachana

questions.explanation: Food safety ka matlab hai khane ko bacteria, chemicals ya physical contaminants se bachana taaki log bimar na hon.

questions.question: Haath dhone ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.A: Sabun aur paani se kam se kam 20 seconds tak ragadna

questions.explanation: Haath dhone ka sahi tareeka hai sabun aur paani ka istemal karke kam se kam 20 seconds tak ragadna, khaas kar khana banane ya serve karne se pehle.

questions.question: Cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Raw food aur cooked food ko alag rakhna aur alag utensils use karna
options.C: Ek hi cutting board use karna
options.D: Cooked food ko raw food ke paas rakhna

questions.explanation: Raw aur cooked food ko alag rakhna aur alag cutting boards, knives use karne se cross-contamination rukta hai.

questions.question: Food ko safe temperature par rakhna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki bacteria na badhein
options.D: Taaki khana jaldi thanda ho jaye

questions.explanation: Bacteria 'Danger Zone' (4°C se 60°C) mein tezi se badhte hain. Isliye khane ko ya toh garam (above 60°C) ya thanda (below 4°C) rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar koi fire accident ho jaye, toh sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Alarm bajana aur sabko warn karna
options.B: Seedha aag bujhane ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle alarm bajana aur sabko surakshit jagah par jaane ke liye alert karna sabse important hai.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'HACCP' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (food safety system)

questions.explanation: HACCP ek systematic preventive approach to food safety and risk management.

questions.question: Agar koi guest complain kare ki khana theek nahi hai (spoiled hai), toh waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Guest ki baat sunna, khana check karna aur manager ko inform karna
options.B: Guest ko kehna ki woh jhooth bol raha hai

questions.explanation: Aise complain ko seriously lena aur turant manager ko batana zaroori hai taaki situation ko handle kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'pest control' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki keede-makode (cockroaches, rats) na failien jo bimariyan faila sakte hain

questions.explanation: Pest control food contamination aur health risks ko rokne ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Billing section mein waiter ka kya role hai?

options.A: Guest ka bill check karna, correct karna aur payment process mein help karna

questions.explanation: Waiter ko bill check karna, koi mistake ho toh correct karna aur payment lete waqt guest ki help karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar koi guest cash mein payment kar raha hai aur usse change dena hai, toh waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sahi amount ka change dena aur receipt dena
options.D: Guest ko kehna ki woh khud count kar le

questions.explanation: Sahi amount ka change dena aur transaction ko complete karna waiter ki zimmedari hai.

questions.question: Credit card se payment lete waqt kya precautions lene chahiye?

options.A: Card details ko secure rakhna aur machine ka sahi use karna

questions.explanation: Card details ki security bahut important hai. Waiter ko sensitive information share nahi karni chahiye.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'POS system' ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Order lena, billing karna aur inventory manage karna

questions.explanation: POS (Point of Sale) system restaurant operations ko streamline karta hai, jismein order taking, billing aur inventory management shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar bill mein koi mistake ho, toh waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Guest ke saath milkar mistake check karni chahiye aur manager se correct karwana chahiye
options.C: Guest ko kehna ki woh sahi hai

questions.explanation: Bill mein mistake hone par guest ko sahi information dena aur use correct karwana achhi practice hai.

questions.question: Restaurant mein 'liquor license' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taaki restaurant alcohol serve kar sake legally

questions.explanation: Liquor license government dwara di gayi permission hai jo restaurant ko alcohol bechne aur serve karne ki anumati deti hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest bill pay karne ke baad kuch bhool jaye (jaise phone), toh waiter ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Guest ko turant bulakar saman wapas dena
options.C: Guest ko kehna ki woh wapas nahi milega
options.D: Saman ko table par hi chhod dena

questions.explanation: Guest ke chhootey hue saman ko turant unhe wapas karna ek responsible aur helpful act hai.
